name: Curried Tofu with Spinach and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 large plum tomatoes, cut into eighths
recipeInstructions:
Press the tofu between 2 plates, turning it over medium heat and pressing down until all the water is released.
Cut the defrosted tofu into 1 inch cubes.
Saute the onions until lightly browned, about 3 minutes. Add the water and blend in the curry paste and coconut. Stir in the tofu, making sure it all gets coated with the curry sauce. Stir in the tomatoes.
Cover and cook over medium heat until the tomatoes are soft, about 5 minutes. If the mixture seems quite dry, stir in 1/4 cup water. Add the spinach. Cover and continue cooking until the spinach is tender, 2-3 minutes. Add salt and the cilantro, if desired.
Serve the curry in bowls over steamed basmati rice, with your favorite sweet mango chutney on the side.
